sections.paragraph:
- Original: κατευθύνω

- Transliteration: Kateuthuno

- Phonetic: kat-yoo-thoo'-no

- Definition:

1. to make straight, guide, direct

a. of the removal of the hindrances to coming to one

- Origin: from G2596 and G2116

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2590 and G2116; to straighten fully that is (figuratively) direct: - guide direct.
